recommendations.title: Oceans
recommendations.overview: An ecological drama/documentary, filmed throughout the globe. Part thriller, part meditation on the vanishing wonders of the sub-aquatic world.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: Chivas: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A documentary that chronicles the recent years of the famous C.D. Guadalajara, a Mexican football club commonly known as 'Chivas', their ups and downs, victories and struggles.

recommendations.title: Winged Migration
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows various migratory bird species on their long journeys from their summer homes to the equator and back, covering thousands of miles and navigating by the stars. These arduous treks are crucial for survival, seeking hospitable

recommendations.title: American Murder: The Family Next Door
recommendations.overview: Using raw, firsthand footage, this documentary examines the disappearance of Shanann Watts and her children, and the terrible events that followed.

recommendations.title: The Selfish Giant
recommendations.overview: A hyperactive boy and his best friend, a slow-witted youth with an affinity for horses, start collecting scrap metal for a shady dealer.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Born into Brothels: Calcutta's Red Light Kids
recommendations.overview: Documentary depicting the lives of child prostitutes in the red light district of Songachi, Calcutta. Director Zana Briski went to photograph the prostitutes when she met and became friends with their children. Briski began giving photography lessons

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: All the Beauty and the Bloodshed
recommendations.overview: The life of internationally renowned artist and activist Nan Goldin is told through her slideshows, intimate interviews, ground-breaking photography, and rare footage of her personal fight to hold the Sackler family accountable for the overdose crisi
